info.name: IELTS Master — Admin API
info.description: Complete admin API collection for managing IELTS practice tests. Covers authentication, practice tests, listening parts, reading passages, question groups, and questions.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Cambridge IELTS 18 — Listening Test 1",
  "description": "Full listening test with 4 parts and 40 questions.",
  "test_type": "LISTENING",
  "difficulty_level": "INTERMEDIATE",
  "test_format": "FULL_TEST",
  "total_questions": 40,
  "time_limit_seconds": 1800,
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "title": "Cambridge IELTS 18 — Reading Test 1",
  "description": "Full reading test with 3 passages and 40 questions.",
  "test_type": "READING",
  "difficulty_level": "INTERMEDIATE",
  "test_format": "FULL_TEST",
  "total_questions": 40,
  "time_limit_seconds": 3600,
  "is_active": true
}

item.name: List listening parts for a test

body.raw:
{
  "part_number": "PART_1",
  "title": "Accommodation enquiry",
  "transcript_text": "Agent: Good morning, Campus Accommodations. How can I help you?\nStudent: Hi, I'm looking for a room near the university...",
  "max_questions": 10,
  "time_limit_seconds": 0,
  "is_active": true
}

item.name: List reading passages for a test

body.raw:
{
  "passage_number": "PASSAGE_1",
  "title": "The History of Solar Energy",
  "passage_text": "Solar energy has been harnessed by humans since ancient times. The photovoltaic effect was first observed by Edmond Becquerel in 1839, when he discovered that certain materials produce small amounts of electric current when exposed to light...",
  "max_questions": 13,
  "time_limit_seconds": 1200,
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "listening_part": "{{part_id}}",
  "reading_passage": null,
  "variant_set": "{{variant_set_id}}",
  "question_type": "FORM_COMPLETION",
  "group_order": 1,
  "instructions": "Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.",
  "question_number_start": 1,
  "question_number_end": 6,
  "word_limit": 1,
  "number_allowed": true,
  "group_content_json": {
    "template_text": "Name: {1}\nPhone: {2}\nAddress: {3}\nEmail: {4}\nBudget: £{5}\nAvailable from: {6}"
  },
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "listening_part": "{{part_id}}",
  "reading_passage": null,
  "variant_set": "{{variant_set_id}}",
  "question_type": "MCQ_SINGLE",
  "group_order": 2,
  "instructions": "Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.",
  "question_number_start": 7,
  "question_number_end": 10,
  "word_limit": null,
  "number_allowed": false,
  "group_content_json": null,
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "listening_part": null,
  "reading_passage": "{{passage_id}}",
  "variant_set": "{{variant_set_id}}",
  "question_type": "TFNG",
  "group_order": 1,
  "instructions": "Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Choose TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.",
  "question_number_start": 1,
  "question_number_end": 5,
  "word_limit": null,
  "number_allowed": false,
  "group_content_json": null,
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "listening_part": null,
  "reading_passage": "{{passage_id}}",
  "variant_set": "{{variant_set_id}}",
  "question_type": "MATCHING_HEADINGS",
  "group_order": 2,
  "instructions": "Choose the correct heading for each section from the list of headings below.",
  "question_number_start": 6,
  "question_number_end": 10,
  "word_limit": null,
  "number_allowed": false,
  "group_content_json": {
    "headings": [
      { "key": "i", "text": "Early attempts at harnessing sunlight" },
      { "key": "ii", "text": "The commercial breakthrough" },
      { "key": "iii", "text": "Opposition from fossil fuel industries" },
      { "key": "iv", "text": "Government incentives and policy" },
      { "key": "v", "text": "Environmental advantages" },
      { "key": "vi", "text": "Limitations of current technology" },
      { "key": "vii", "text": "Future projections" }
    ]
  },
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "listening_part": null,
  "reading_passage": "{{passage_id}}",
  "variant_set": "{{variant_set_id}}",
  "question_type": "SUMMARY_COMPLETION",
  "group_order": 3,
  "instructions": "Complete the summary below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.",
  "question_number_start": 11,
  "question_number_end": 13,
  "word_limit": 2,
  "number_allowed": false,
  "group_content_json": {
    "summary_text": "The {11} effect forms the basis of solar technology. Modern panels convert {12} into electricity. Costs have fallen due to improvements in {13}.",
    "word_bank": null
  },
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "question_group": "{{group_id}}",
  "question_number": 6,
  "question_text": "Section A",
  "options_json": null,
  "correct_answer_json": { "answer": "i" },
  "explanation": "Section A discusses early attempts at capturing sunlight.",
  "is_active": true
}
